# The Signalling Company

> 100% software-defined Automatic Train Protection (ATP) for European freight and passenger railways.

The Signalling Company (TSC) is a Belgian digital rail company founded in 2019 by Stanislas Pinte, with Alexandre Betis — now CEO — as employee number one and CTO. It was acquired by Škoda Group in 2023. TSC designs, certifies, installs, and maintains onboard ATP systems for locomotives and trains.

Its founding premise is Safety-as-Software: that railway signalling can be implemented in software and made independent of hardware, decoupling it from device obsolescence and regulatory change. The result is RailOS, a portable, SIL4-certified real-time operating system with its own application development environment. RailOS runs international (ETCS) and national Class B (TBL1+, PZB, KVB) train protection applications on a single safe computer, the iEVC, using standard off-the-shelf Ethernet-connected devices. When standards change, the software updates and the hardware stays. Over a rail vehicle's 50-year-plus life, this converts capital-intensive system replacement into software-only upgrades.

TSC's ETCS application was certified in September 2025, an industry record. RailOS powers the ETCS and Class B retrofit of 109 Lineas freight locomotives operating in Belgium, the Netherlands, and Germany, and is designed into Škoda Transportation's 27Ev hybrid multiple-unit fleet for RegioJet. RailOS is also the industry's first open ATP platform: qualified third-party developers can build, test, and certify their own applications using a RailOS Application Development Kit.

TSC serves fleet operators, fleet leasing companies, infrastructure managers, and locomotive and train manufacturers.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/): Software-defined ATP — fleets stay compliant, costs stay down, systems don't go obsolete
- [RailOS](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos): The software-defined operating system for safety-critical train protection
- [Products](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/products): Onboard and trackside digital rail products, powered by RailOS Apps and Devices
- [Services](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/services): Full-lifecycle services for ETCS and Class B projects
- [Projects](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/projects): Customer segments and case studies
- [About](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/about): Founding story, Safety-as-Software, and the four company values
- [Leadership](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/leadership): Executive team
- [Careers](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/careers): Open roles — "join our 50+ train-blazers"
- [FAQ](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/faq): Certification, multi-country operation, and retrofit questions
- [News](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/news): Product milestones, certifications, customer wins, and industry perspective
- [Contact](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/contact): Enquiries and contact form

## RailOS platform

- [RailOS Overview](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos): One platform, every ATP system — run multiple ATP applications on a single SIL4 computer
- [RailOS Apps](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos/apps): Safety-critical and data applications running on the iEVC
- [RailOS Devices](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos/devices): Tested, RailOS-qualified Ethernet plug-and-play devices, powered from 24–110 VDC or PoE
- [RailOS App Store](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos/app-store): Browse and select ATP applications for your fleet (under construction)
- [Open RailOS](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos/open): App Developer Program, with a General ADK for non-safety-critical applications and a Safe ADK for safety-critical ones

## Products

- [ETCS](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/products/etcs): Certified, award-winning onboard ETCS Baseline 3 and 4 on the iEVC-RailOS platform, delivering 5x–10x TCO gains over conventional rack-based systems; upgradable to ATO over ETCS
- [TBL1+](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/products/tbl1): Belgian Class B ATP, including +, ++, and NG variations, in stand-alone or ETCS-integrated configurations
- [PZB](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/products/pzb): Class B ATP for Germany, Austria, Romania, Serbia, and Croatia, in stand-alone or ETCS-integrated configurations
- [KVB](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/products/kvb): French Class B ATP, in stand-alone or ETCS-integrated configurations
- [Telecom Box](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/products/telecom-box): Ruggedized telecom gateway replacing multiple stand-alone telecom and GPS devices; FRMCS- and TOBA-ready

A sixth product, wSTM — a universal software-defined STM integrating third-party national Class B systems — is described on the Products page; see the [wSTM App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/wstm-app) for detail.

## Services

- [ETCS Retrofit Viability Assessment](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/services/etcs-retrofit-viability-assessment): Determines the technical, regulatory, and authorization risk and cost of retrofitting a fleet with ETCS
- [First-in-Class Homologation](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/services/first-in-class-homologation): Complete V-cycle service packs from concept design to Authorization to Place In Service (APIS)
- [Series Installation & Commissioning](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/services/series-installation-commissioning): Turn-key installation through to supervision, audit, and training
- [Training](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/services/training): Courses for drivers, maintenance technicians, and operational managers
- [Maintenance](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/services/maintenance): Post-warranty corrective, preventative, and predictive maintenance packs for up to 10 years or longer

Service partners: Prose, Brouwer, SNCB/NMBS Technics.

## Projects

- [Lineas HLD77](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/projects/lineas-hld77): ETCS and Class B retrofit of 109 freight locomotives — 87 with ETCS plus Belgian ATP, 22 with ETCS plus Belgian, German, and Dutch ATP — with a 10-year maintenance programme and no additional floorspace used. Installation takes about ten days per locomotive and automated commissioning under three hours.
- [Škoda RegioJet 27Ev](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/projects/skoda-regiojet): ETCS and Czech Class B designed into 34 new-build hybrid bi-mode electro-diesel multiple units (18 two-car, 16 three-car) for RegioJet, entering service from December 2029
- [Akiem BR189](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/projects/akiem-br189): Feasibility assessment for retrofitting ETCS to a Siemens electric freight locomotive fleet operating across ten European countries

Customer segments served: fleet operators (freight, passenger, track maintenance), fleet leasing companies, infrastructure managers, and locomotive and train manufacturers.

## RailOS applications

All RailOS ATP applications run on the iEVC, a certified SIL4 safe computer.

- [ETCS App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/etcs-app): Flagship ATP application, certified in 2025; combines with the iSTM and wSTM apps for no-code interoperability with national Class B systems
- [TBL1+ App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/tbl1-app): Belgian Class B ATP, in service on the Lineas HLD77 fleet since 2025; available with ++ and NG variations
- [PZB App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/pzb-app): German, Austrian, and Romanian Class B ATP; in development and undergoing certification
- [KVB App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/kvb-app): French Class B ATP; in development and undergoing certification
- [iSTM App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/istm-app): Fully software-defined Specific Transmission Module for integrating RailOS-native ETCS and Class B apps
- [wSTM App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/wstm-app): Specific Transmission Module for integrating third-party national Class B systems
- [TCMS App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/tcms-app): Train Control and Management System application, customised to the vehicle sub-system integration plan
- [DJR App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/djr-app): Digital Journey Replay — an analytics tool for troubleshooting onboard and trackside signalling anomalies
- [TRU App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/tru-app): Configurable for Diagnostic Recording Unit or Juridical Recording Unit function; with Crash Protected Memory it removes the need for a separate JRU device
- [LRU App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/lru-app): Windows-based local and remote data extraction and pre-processing for any analytics platform
- [TOBA App](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-apps/toba-app): Telecom On-Board Architecture application for multi-technology onboard telecom and satcom access

RailOS also includes built-in system health and diagnostic applications for drivers and remote operations centre staff.

## RailOS devices

- [iEVC](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/ievc): SIL4 safe computer hosting RailOS; supports Ethernet, Ethernet-TRDP, digital IO relays, and CANopen; available in 19-inch or ruggedized Computer Box format
- [Computer Box](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/computer-box): Ruggedized housing for the iEVC, mountable anywhere on the vehicle — ideal for retrofits
- [Sensor Box](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/sensor-box): ATP sensor gateway integrating odometry and signalling modules; used with ETCS, KVB, and TBL1
- [Telecom Box](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/telecom-box): Ruggedized telecom gateway supporting TOBA, extendable to FRMCS and 6G
- [DMI (Driver Machine Interface)](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/dmi-driver-machine-interface): Configurable 8-inch and 12-inch driver displays, with or without speakers
- [JRU](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/jru): Juridical Recording Unit combining the recording app with Crash Protected Memory
- [Data Storage Unit (DSU)](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/data-storage-unit-dsu): Mass data storage in a range of sizes and crash protection ratings
- [Euroantenna](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/euroantenna): Signalling sensor designed without active electronics, supporting multiple ATP standards
- [GPS](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/gps): GNSS access device, standalone or integrated into the Telecom Box
- [Doppler Radar](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/doppler-radar): Speed sensor connected to the Sensor Box
- [CoRRail](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/corrail): Advanced optical speed sensor connected to the Sensor Box
- [Optical Pulse Generator](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/optical-pulse-generator): Optical speed sensor connected to the Sensor Box
- [Crocodile & Encoder](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/crocodile-encoder): Signalling sensor used with the TBL1 and KVB apps in Belgium and France
- [PZB Magnet & Magnet Reader](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/pzb-magnet-magnet-reader): Signalling sensor used with the PZB app in Germany
- [GSM-R & FRMCS Radio](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/gsm-r-frmcs-radio): ERTMS radio, standalone or integrated into the Telecom Box
- [Wi-Fi / 4G / 5G Radio](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/wifi-4-5-6g-radio): Broadband remote access gateway
- [Ethernet Switch](https://www.thesignallingcompany.com/railos-devices/ethernet-switch): High-reliability industrial switch in PoE and non-PoE variants

Device partners: Duagon, Mios, Deuta, Scle, Hasler Rail, Lantech, Triorail.

## Company values

TSC is driven by four core values: think strategically, care for what we do and how we do it, collaborate extensively, and act rationally. On safety: "We entrust the lives of our children to our systems."
